hooks.command:
jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"SessionStart",additionalContext:"# cosmos-frontend conventions (loaded at session start)

**Reference vs target:**
- Target (write here): cosmos-frontend/
- Reference (read-only): cosmos-app/ — friend prototype
- Backend (call this): cosmos-backend/ via REST/SSE per docs/api-reference.md

**Pick the right lane before writing code:**
- src/app/** → page-author
- src/components/** → component-author
- src/lib/api/** → api-client-author
- src/lib/supabase/**, src/proxy.ts → auth-wirer
- messages/**, src/i18n/** → i18n-author
- src/lib/query/** → client-state-author
- Code review → code-reviewer
- Tests → test-author
- Build/runtime/hydration error → debugger
- Cross-layer plan → planner

**Next.js 16 has BREAKING CHANGES vs training data.** Context7 MCP first for any non-trivial App Router code. params/searchParams are Promise<...> and must be awaited.

**Skills auto-loaded into subagents:** react-best-practices, composition-patterns, frontend-design, web-design-guidelines, webapp-testing, context7-mcp; plus superpowers: test-driven-development, verification-before-completion, systematic-debugging, writing-plans, dispatching-parallel-agents, receiving-code-review.

**Slash commands:** /add-page, /add-component, /add-locale, /wire-endpoint, /run-frontend, /fetch-docs, /check-frontend.

**Rules:** see .claude/rules/."}}'

prompt=$(jq -r '.prompt // ""' 2>/dev/null); hints=""; printf -v nl '\n'; if echo "$prompt" | grep -qiE '\b(next\.?js|app router|server component|client component|layout|page|route handler)\b'; then hints="$hints$nl- Next 16 work → page-author. params/searchParams are Promise<...>. Context7 first for any non-trivial pattern."; fi; if echo "$prompt" | grep -qiE '\b(component|button|card|chart|modal|form|input)\b'; then hints="$hints$nl- Component work → component-author. Tailwind tokens, no hardcoded strings, semantic HTML."; fi; if echo "$prompt" | grep -qiE '\b(supabase|auth|sign.?in|sign.?up|session|jwt)\b'; then hints="$hints$nl- Auth → auth-wirer. Use @supabase/ssr (NOT auth-helpers-nextjs). Middleware refresh required."; fi; if echo "$prompt" | grep -qiE '\b(i18n|locale|translation|message|next-intl)\b'; then hints="$hints$nl- i18n → i18n-author or /add-locale. All 3 locale files stay in sync."; fi; if echo "$prompt" | grep -qiE '\b(endpoint|api call|backend|fetch|client|sse)\b'; then hints="$hints$nl- Backend integration → api-client-author or /wire-endpoint. All calls via src/lib/api/. JWT Bearer auth."; fi; if echo "$prompt" | grep -qiE '\b(react query|tanstack|usequery|usemutation|zustand|state)\b'; then hints="$hints$nl- Server state → client-state-author. React Query in src/lib/query/. No useEffect-fetching."; fi; if echo "$prompt" | grep -qiE '\b(tailwind|theme|color|css|style)\b'; then hints="$hints$nl- Styling → component-author + tailwind-tokens rule. Use --bg / --ink / --accent tokens, no hardcoded colors, no dark: variants."; fi; if echo "$prompt" | grep -qiE '\b(playwright|vitest|test|e2e|coverage|msw)\b'; then hints="$hints$nl- Tests → test-author. Vitest unit + Playwright E2E + MSW for backend mocking."; fi; if echo "$prompt" | grep -qiE '\b(review|code review|pr review)\b'; then hints="$hints$nl- Review → code-reviewer subagent. Read-only."; fi; if echo "$prompt" | grep -qiE '\b(bug|failing|error|hydration|build fail|stack trace|404|500)\b'; then hints="$hints$nl- Failure → debugger subagent. systematic-debugging skill loaded."; fi; if echo "$prompt" | grep -qiE '\b(plan|design|architect|breakdown|how do i)\b'; then hints="$hints$nl- Multi-layer task → planner subagent."; fi; if [ -n "$hints" ]; then jq -n --arg h "$hints" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"UserPromptSubmit",additionalContext:("# Routing hints" + $h)}}'; else echo '{}'; fi

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'rm -rf /|rm -rf ~|rm -rf \$HOME|git push --force|git reset --hard origin'; then jq -n '{permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"Destructive command blocked. If you really need this, ask the user explicitly."}'; else echo '{}'; fi

file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$file" | grep -qE 'src/app/'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",additionalContext:"PAGE LANE — delegate to page-author. Next 16: params/searchParams are Promise<...>; await them. Context7 first."}}'; elif echo "$file" | grep -qE 'src/components/'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",additionalContext:"COMPONENT LANE — delegate to component-author. Tailwind tokens, no hardcoded strings."}}'; elif echo "$file" | grep -qE 'src/lib/api/'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",additionalContext:"API CLIENT LANE — delegate to api-client-author. Reference cosmos-backend/docs/api-reference.md."}}'; elif echo "$file" | grep -qE 'src/lib/supabase/|src/proxy\.ts'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",additionalContext:"AUTH LANE — delegate to auth-wirer. Use @supabase/ssr."}}'; elif echo "$file" | grep -qE 'messages/|src/i18n/'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",additionalContext:"I18N LANE — delegate to i18n-author. Keep en/hi/te in sync."}}'; elif echo "$file" | grep -qE 'src/lib/query/'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",additionalContext:"QUERY LANE — delegate to client-state-author. React Query v5 conventions."}}'; else echo '{}'; fi

file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$file" | grep -qE 'messages/[a-z]+\.json$'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:"Locale file changed. Verify all 3 (en/hi/te) have the same key set. Run /check-frontend to audit."},suppressOutput:true}'; elif echo "$file" | grep -qE 'src/lib/api/'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:"API client changed. Add a Vitest unit with MSW (delegate to test-author). Update src/lib/query/ hook if response shape changed."},suppressOutput:true}'; elif echo "$file" | grep -qE 'package\.json$'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:"package.json changed. Run npm install. If new lib added, Context7 it before using."},suppressOutput:true}'; elif echo "$file" | grep -qE 'src/proxy\.ts$'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:"Middleware changed. Verify both Supabase session refresh and next-intl locale routing still work — they must coexist."},suppressOutput:true}'; else echo '{"suppressOutput":true}'; fi
